div.h1: TECHNICAL DESIGN: Relocation Processing Data Flow
div.p: Intel Manual Quality Spec — Binary Patching Sequence Layout Engine: ELK | ISA: x86_64 | Format: ELF64
PC32 Calculation Formula: S + A - P S (Symbol): 0x401020 A (Addend): -4 P (Place): 0x401005 Result: 0x17

g.text: P (Place): VAddr of field being relocated
S (Symbol): Value of the symbol in VSpace
A (Addend): Constant added to S by reloc
